subcodes.first_line: O Imam! There hath appeared before the Throne a Book wherein thy mention was inscribed. Thus have We adorned thee with this remembrance that hath gone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امام قد حضر لدی العرش کتاب کان فیه ذکرک لذا زیناک بهذا الذکر الذی خرج
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
